# claude_workspace_member (Resource)

Manages a Claude workspace member.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claude_workspace_member" "example" {
  workspace_id   = claude_workspace.example.id
  user_id        = claude_user.example.id
  workspace_role = "workspace_developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user.
- `workspace_id` (String) The ID of the workspace.
- `workspace_role` (String) The role of the member in the workspace. Valid values: workspace_user, workspace_developer, workspace_admin.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The composite identifier of the workspace member (workspace_id/user_id).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Format: workspace_id/user_id
terraform import claude_workspace_member.example wrkspc_01EXAMPLE/user_01EXAMPLE
```
